message:
fix(doctor): remove stale mention of out-of-order from VACUUM comment

The inline comment at the VACUUM call site still mentioned
"out-of-order index entries" as a target for VACUUM, but
report_has_page_corruption no longer matches that pattern (it's
classified as a benign frankensqlite artifact). Align the comment
with the actual behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
